name: Tundralia: The Frigid Frontier
short_description: Tundralia is an RPG in which you play as a novice adventurer, seeking to find fame and fortune in a frozen wasteland. Explore a stylized open world, fight as one of three classes using traditional tab target combat, complete quests, delve into dungeons, and collect a plethora of equipment.
detailed_description:
In 'Tundralia: The Frigid Frontier' you play as a novice adventurer who has come to the frozen wasteland, known as Tundralia, to find fame and fortune. Tundralia is a place steeped in danger and history, and the hardy folk that make it home need all the help they can get. Partake in quests in an stylized open world. Equip yourself with an array of armour, weapons and accessories. Delve into dungeons for exotic rewards and find hidden collectables through the world to unlock rare minipets, weapons and armour.

Main Features:

  • Fight enemies using classic tab target combat inspired by old school MMORPG's and RPGs.

  • Play as either the marauder, witch or ranger and utilise an array of different abilities.

  • Adventure through a stylized open world known as Tundralia and discover interesting locales such a dense pine forests, frozen ice canyons and frigid snow fields.

  • Uncover a rising darkness seeking to destroy Tundralia and the people that call it home in a series of story-driven quests.

Other Features:

  • Delve into challenging dungeons to fight bosses for exotic rewards used to increase your power or alter your appearance.

  • Learn and craft an array of recipes, from a simple potion used to return your health to accessories that improve your stats.

  • Collect a plethora of equipment and items such as armour, accessories, weapons, minipets, and potions.

  • Buy a house and decorate it with range of furniture.

  • Find collectables hidden throughout the world.

  • Destroy rifts that dynamically open across the landscape and spew out demons from the unseen realm.

  • Build up your reputation with various factions for unique rewards.
